uiWarning.en: Only KeePassXC preferences are copied. Password databases (.kdbx), key files, and hardware-token setup are excluded from automatic migration.
uiWarning.tr: Yalnizca KeePassXC tercihleri kopyalanir. Parola veritabanlari (.kdbx), anahtar dosyalari ve donanim-token kurulumu otomatik tasimadan haric tutulur.

manualTodo: EN: Copy each verified .kdbx vault and required key file using your trusted encrypted backup or sync method.
TR: Dogrulanmis her .kdbx kasasini ve gerekli anahtar dosyasini guvenilir sifreli yedek/senkron yonteminizle tasiyin.
